## Component spec template (copy/paste)

### Overview

- **Component name**:
- **Purpose / user value**:
- **Non-goals**:
- **Platforms**: (web / iOS / Android)

### Anatomy / slots

- **Slots**:
- **Content rules**: (length, truncation, wrapping, empty values)

### Variants

- **Variant props**:
- **Variant matrix**: (compact)

### States

- Default / Hover / Pressed / Focus / Disabled
- Loading / Success / Error (if applicable)
- Empty (if applicable)

### Behavior

- **Interaction rules**:
- **Motion**: (and reduced motion behavior)

### Theming + token hooks

- **Tokens used**: (color, typography, spacing, radius, elevation)
- **Theme overrides**: (what’s safe to override)

### Accessibility

- **Keyboard**:
- **Screen reader**: (name/role/value; announcements if needed)
- **Contrast**:

### Invalid combinations

- 

### QA checklist

- [ ] Variant/state coverage
- [ ] Keyboard + focus visible
- [ ] Labels and error association
- [ ] Contrast meets requirements
- [ ] Reduced motion behavior
- [ ] Theming doesn’t break layout
